Checkout.title: Checkout
Checkout.electronicPaymentDesc: Pay via e-wallets or cards (Coming Soon)
Checkout.transferPaymentDesc: Send manual transfer and upload receipt for confirmation
Checkout.transferInstructions: Please send the total to account: (123456789) then upload the receipt below.
Checkout.uploadReceiptDesc: Click here to upload your transfer receipt
Checkout.errorReceiptRequired: Please upload the transfer receipt first
Checkout.priceFrozenDesc: Price has been frozen to guarantee your financial rights
Checkout.outOfStock: Sorry, the product ({product}) just went out of stock. Please adjust your cart.
Checkout.orderError: An error occurred while submitting the order, please try again.
Checkout.errorCheckCoupon: An error occurred while checking the coupon.

Success.orderReceived: Your order has been received successfully and will be reviewed immediately.
Success.transferNote: Since you chose bank transfer, please send a screenshot of the receipt via WhatsApp to secure your order and lock the price.
Success.step1: The merchant will review your information and the uploaded receipt.
Success.step2: You will receive a confirmation message once the order is accepted.
Success.step3: Preparation and shipping of your order will begin promptly.

Landing.badge: Leading Cloud Commerce Platform in Yemen
Landing.description: Transform your business into a global brand. 'Buyers' provides all the tools you need to manage products, orders, and customers with one click.
Landing.hero_proof: Joined by over 500+ emerging Yemeni brands
Landing.comparison_title: Elevate Your Business from Chaos to Global
compare_bad_items: Orders scattered between WhatsApp and Telegram
Delays in updating prices and inventory
No performance reports or customer data
compare_good_items: Instant inventory sync and price updates
Deep business intelligence and profit reports
Professional interface that doubles your sales
Landing.features_title: A Complete Arsenal of Tools in Your Hands
Landing.f1_desc: System ready to work instantly. No need for developers or complex technical expertise.
Landing.f2_desc: Full encryption for customer data and order protection via secure cloud servers.
Landing.f3_desc: Control your store with ultimate flexibility from your phone or PC anywhere.
Landing.f4_desc: Analyze buyer behavior and use smart coupons to increase conversion rates.
Landing.f5_desc: Target local and global markets with support for YER, SAR, and USD.
Landing.f6_desc: Instant WhatsApp notifications for both customer and merchant for every new purchase.
Landing.final_cta_title: Start Your Journey to Leadership Today
Landing.final_cta_desc: Be one of the entrepreneurs who changed the rules of the game in the Yemeni market.

Footer.fastDeliveryDesc: Reliable delivery service to all regions of Yemen
